headline: MARKET WRAP
desc:
MARKET WRAP — Mar 24, 2026

Markets reflected stagflationary pressures as the VIX spiked to 27 while gold pushed to $4,403, signaling investor flight to hard assets amid persistent inflation concerns.
telegramText: MARKET WRAP — Mar 24, 2026 Markets reflected stagflationary pressures as the VIX spiked to 27 while gold pushed to $4,403, signaling investor flight to hard assets amid persistent inflation concerns. The dollar's strength near 99 weighed on risk assets, with tech lagging as QQQ underperformed SPY in a classic rotation away from growth. Crypto held up relatively well, suggesting digital assets may be finding a floor as an alternative store of value. CLOSING PRICES BTC: $70,260 · ETH: $2,146 · SOL: $90.28 · GOLD: $4,403 · SPY: $653.18 (+0.7%) · QQQ: $583.98 (+0.3%) · VIX: $26.95 (+3.1%) · TLT: $86.01 (+0.2%) · DXY: $99.18 (+0.2%) · OIL: $88.61 (+0.5%) SECTOR CLOSE 🟢 XLE (Energy) +1.9% · XLK (Technology) -1.9% · XLF (Financials) -0.6% 🔴 COPX (Copper Miners) -5.6% · URA (Uranium) -4.7% · XLB (Materials) -4.0% SIGNALS 🟡 Crypto / Bitcoin (intensity 40) — BTC, ETH EVENING NEWS 🔴 Victory Capital Withdraws Bid for Janus Henderson 🟢 Dollar Advances on Reports the US to Deploy Troops to the Middle East 🔴 Robinhood reloads stock repurchase plan to $1.5 billion as shares continue in downtrend 🟢 Iran Rejects Peace Talk Claims, Leaving Bitcoin Stuck At $70K 🟢 Australian Pension Giant Eyes Bitcoin Access For 2.2 Million Members 🟡 Erdene Announces 2025 Results - Provides Bayan Khundii Gold Mine and Exploration Update REGIME CHECK 🔴 Risk-Off · Neutral · STAGFLATION · Gauge: 84.9/100 UPCOMING — HIGH IMPACT US Unemployment Rate(Mar) — Apr 3, 12:30 PM UTC (prev: 4.4%) US Seasonally adjusted changes in non-agricultural employment population (thousands)(Mar) — Apr 3, 12:30 PM UTC (prev: -92) Caixin Services Purchasing Managers Index(Mar) — Apr 3, 01:45 AM UTC (prev: 56.7) US Trade Balance (billion USD)(Feb) — Apr 2, 12:30 PM UTC (prev: -54.5) US ISM Manufacturing Purchasing Managers Index(Mar) — Apr 1, 02:00 PM UTC (prev: 52.4) US Change in ADP employment (thousands)(Mar) — Apr 1, 12:15 PM UTC (prev: 63.0) agentcanary.ai | Not financial advice
